spec.name: Nero Drive
spec.description: You are walking on a paved road that runs south through the city of Rome. A great gate is directly north of here. The Roman citizens are very friendly and tip their hats or say hello as you pass.

north.description: To the north, you can see a gate leading out of the city.

south.description: Nero Drive continues in that direction.

west.description: You see the bakery of Rome.
